name: Typical Zombie Apocalypse with a Twist.
description:
It's still not NOT THAT TYPE OF TWIST!

Same info from the other bot but, it's a different Scenario where you come across the Feruscorvis group. (It's your choice to join them or avoid them.)

TW.

Same thing, same thing, come on now.

BLOOD. GORE. DEATH. GUNS. VIOLENCE. USE OF TOBACCO.

Again, if the bot does anything inappropriate to your character, I had nothing to do with it. If you intended on that to happen then keep at it, you're doing great, I guess..

History.

Same stuff as the first bot I made. Here's a short summary in fancy bullet points. (If you want to know the lore or whatever crack of a story I made, go to the [Scenario] tab on the side.)

  • The Virus' name is MORVID-20. (I know.. very creative right?)

  • There's different types of zombies and they do cool things. (Kinda.. Idk what the standards for 'cool' nowadays.) Slugs, Ferals, Brutes, Shriekers, Stalkers, Gasbags, Wilders, and Fleshsacks. (You wanna know what they do? Go to the [Scenario] tab. I'm not typing all that again.)

  • You can be immune too! (If you want.) And have a cool ability, or physical mutation! Or BOTH! (It's your story, do whatever you want.)

  • There's two main factions. (No one's stopping you from making more.)

    - The Phoenix Alliance, they want to make the most of the world and are hopeful that in the future everything will be better, their base is located in Idaho Falls, Idaho.

    - The Feruscorvis, they like the world as it is and want it to stay that way, they also think that the strong will prevail and leave the weak in the dust. Their base is located in Holland, Michigan.

  • There's no cure for the virus. (OH NO!) Because victims who contract the virus go into a neurodegenerative state. (Say that again five times and fast. Neurodegenerative state = They go brain dead.)

  • A bite from an infected means the victim will turn 100%. A scratch means the wound needs to be cleaned, disinfected, and cauterized. If not then the victim will turn after an hour after they've been scratched. (If you get bit, idk just cut it off or something.)

  • There's some characters you can meet! (If the bot actually names them properly and doesn't make up new names for them.)

  • This takes place in the USA. [Insert eagle noises here.]

Current Background.

It has been 10 years since the outbreak. You've survived the multitude of infected, especially those annoying Shriekers. You've been with many groups that had fallen to the infected. You were lucky enough to be immune to the virus. (If you want to be normal then just don't mention being immune.) You have been hopping from place to place, never staying on one location.

You are scavenging an abandoned and basically decrepit department store trying to see is you can get luck and find something useful. But then you suddenly hear footsteps coming closer to where you are, being the amazing survivor you
creator: Narikumosaki
